Ms. Priya Devi Nair, DPO, with review by Mr. Adrian Quek, Partner, Bayfront Lex LLP (SG law firm); contact: dpo@lcmh.example; E m a i l: privacy   @ bayfrontlex.example
Scope: M&A due‑diligence data room for proposed acquisition of Seagrove Robotics Pte. Ltd.; issuer is a Mainboard‑listed company; MNPI handling under SFA and SGX Listing Rule 703.
PDPA basis: consent obtained via onboarding forms (ref: ONB‑2O26‑SEA‑**37**), purpose‑limited; minimisation applied: CVs truncated and NRIC fields masked (T‑XXX‑XXXXZ).
Cross‑border transfer approval: yes — limited HR and vendor contact files exported to counsel in Kowloon and servers in eu‑west‑1; Transfer Impact Assessment per PDPA s.26 completed 30‑May‑2026; contractual clauses ensuring comparable protection (PDPC guidance) are in DPA Schedule 2.
Data Subject Access Request DSAR REQ‑4f3a‑009 received from Mr. Jun Wei Tan on 28‑May‑2026 via https://portal.lcmh.example/dsar?id=REQ-4f3a-009; identity verified; response due in 21 days.
Erasure: upon consent withdrawal by Ms. L. Ortega (l.ortega@seagrove.example) on 27‑May‑2026, marketing records tagged DEL‑PEN; system purge completed 31‑May‑2026 23:59 SGT, with audit hash 9c:a1:••:3e (this is not a device MAC).
Retention: finance payroll extracts retained for 5 years from cessation per retention schedule FIN‑R‑05; archived in sg‑east‑2 vault; no new collection will occur for ex‑employees beyond statutory need.
Minimisation: deal‑room folders “HR‑Profiles” and “Vendor‑KYC” now contain redacted fields only; full birth dates removed; only initials and last 2 digits of phone numbers kept (e.g., +65‑***‑**42).
MNPI control: clean‑team access enforced; only Bayfront Lex LLP and Orchid Quay Capital Advisors (internal) may view non‑public revenue ranges; however, this memo contains no MNPI and does not alter previously disclosed information on SGXNet.
Negative assurance: there has been no Material Adverse Change (no MAC) under the draft SPA, and no insider dealing risk is created by the routine DSAR processing.
Policy‑only control: the system is configured to not collect device MAC addresses or precise geolocation; references to “MAC” herein are contract terms only.
Note on public sources: candidate education history used for verification was drawn from public alumni directories and company web pages; no scraping of restricted sources.
Exception record: request XFR‑2O26‑B7 to send 3 files to au‑syd‑tr1 was rejected on 01‑Jun‑2026 due to missing comparable protection; export will not proceed until DPA Schedule 2 is countersigned.
Clarification: an earlier placeholder string “NRIC:SxxxxxxxA” appearing in a template was never used in production; it was replaced with tokens like S‑*******A before any processing.
For queries, contact PDPA team at pdpa@lcmh.example or call +65 6 0 0 0 0 0 0; office: 38 Pelican Quay, #22‑01, Lion Harbour, Singapore 0 9 9 9 9 9
